title: Memotion Analysis - Sentiment and Type Classification of Memes
description: Classify the overall sentiment of internet memes and identify their communicative types (sarcastic, humorous, offensive, motivational), based on SemEval-2020 Task 8 (Sharma et al.). Annotators analyze both text and image descriptions of memes.
citation:
@inproceedings{sharma-etal-2020-semeval,
    title = "{S}em{E}val-2020 {T}ask 8: {M}emotion {A}nalysis -- the {V}isuo-{L}ingual {M}etaphor!",
    author = "Sharma, Chhavi  and Bhageria, Deepesh  and Scott, William  and Pykl, Srinivas  and Das, Amitava  and Chakraborty, Tanmoy  and Pulabaigari, Viswanath  and Gamback, Bjorn",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Fourteenth Workshop on Semantic Evaluation",
    year = "2020",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2020.semeval-1.99"
}
